source.update_note: 2026-27 season data compiled from eRegulations Oregon Game Bird Seasons page (last updated September 2025) and ODFW 2025-2030 Upland Game Bird Season Framework. Proposed 2026-27 dates used where available; finalized dates expected from ODFW later in 2026.

species.name: Chukar Partridge
species.hunting_units: Statewide (reduced limit in Lower Klamath Hills Regulated Hunt Area — see key notes)

species.name: Ring-necked Pheasant
species.hunting_units: Statewide (+ Special Fee Pheasant Hunts on wildlife areas)

species.name: Quail (California & Mountain)
species.season_raw: Western OR: Sep 1 - Jan 31 | Eastern OR: Oct 10 - Jan 31
species.hunting_units: Western Oregon: Sep 1 - Jan 31 | Eastern Oregon: Oct 10 - Jan 31
species.bag_limit: 10 daily (max 2 mountain quail in eastern OR)

species.name: Sage Grouse
species.hunting_units: Selected WMUs via controlled hunt permit (Beulah, Malheur River, Owyhee, Trout Creek, Whitehorse, Steens Mountain, Beatys Butte, Silvies, Wagontire, Warner units)

key_notes.title: All hunters age 18 and older must possess an Upland Game Bird Validation (resident $10) or Nonresident Game Bird Validation ($44.50) in addition to a valid hunting license.

sources.label: eRegulations — Oregon License, Tag, & Permit Fees
sources.evidence: Upland Game Bird Validation (age 18+): $10.00 resident. Nonresident Game Bird Validation: $44.50.

key_notes.title: Sage grouse hunting is by controlled permit only — apply during the July 1 – August 8 application period.

sources.label: eRegulations — Oregon Game Bird Seasons — Controlled Sage-Grouse Season
sources.evidence: 2025 Controlled Sage-Grouse Season: permit numbers finalized August. Application period July 1 - Aug 8. Season Sept 6-14. Daily & season bag limit: 2 birds.

key_notes.title: Spruce grouse are protected in Oregon and are not open to hunting — learn to distinguish them from blue/ruffed grouse in the Wallowa Mountains.

sources.label: eRegulations — Oregon Game Bird Seasons — Spruce Grouse Protected Species
sources.evidence: Spruce grouse are protected in Oregon and are not open to hunting. Range: Wallowa Mountains only. Male: red eye comb, black throat. Female: browner with white barring.

key_notes.title: Within the Lower Klamath Hills Regulated Hunt Area near Klamath Falls, the daily chukar bag limit is reduced to 2 and possession limit to 4.

sources.label: eRegulations — Oregon Game Bird Seasons — Chukar Partridge
sources.evidence: Within the posted boundaries of the Lower Klamath Hills Regulated Hunt Area near Klamath Falls, the daily chukar bag limit is 2 and possession limit is 4.

key_notes.title: Western Oregon Fee Pheasant Hunts require a valid hunting license, upland game bird validation, and a Western Oregon Fee Pheasant Permit ($25). Only nontoxic shot allowed.

sources.label: eRegulations — Oregon Game Bird Seasons — Western Oregon Fee Pheasant Hunts
sources.evidence: Requirements: Valid hunting license + upland game bird validation + Western Oregon fee pheasant permit ($25). Only federally approved nontoxic shot allowed.

key_notes.title: Only rooster (male) pheasants may be taken. All pheasant seasons are rooster-only.

sources.label: eRegulations — Oregon Game Bird Seasons — Rooster Pheasant
sources.evidence: Rooster Pheasant — Statewide: Oct 11 - Dec 31. 2 daily, 8 possession.
